trade.summary: Francia is Svizzera's second-largest trading partner. Very deep economic integration along the border (Geneva-Lyon corridor). Svizzera exports pharmaceuticals, watches, machinery, and financial services. Francia exports vehicles, food products, aerospace components, and luxury goods.

diplomatic.summary: Exceptionally close relations shaped by shared French-speaking regions, geographic proximity, and deep cultural ties. Svizzera participates in Francophonie. Cooperation in Schengen zone, bilateral treaties with EU. Periodic friction on tax competition and banking secrecy largely resolved.

military.summary: Svizzera's neutrality precludes formal defense ties, but geographic and cultural proximity creates informal security alignment. Svizzera has purchased French military equipment historically. No joint exercises.

financial.summary: Deeply intertwined financial systems with major cross-border flows. Geneva and Paris are both major financial centers with complementary roles. Swiss banks hold significant French assets. French companies are major investors in Svizzera.

energy.summary: Svizzera imports significant nuclear-generated electricity from Francia. Francia benefits from Swiss pumped-storage hydropower for load balancing. Bilateral electricity trade is among the most important in Europe.

scientific.summary: Very intensive scientific collaboration. CERN is a joint Swiss-French facility. ETH Zurich, EPFL, and French grandes écoles maintain deep partnerships. Shared language facilitates collaboration in life sciences, physics, and engineering.
